description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page
AND Live Featured content is in the Games carousel
AND the user is Entitled to the Live Featured content

*NOTE: Live Featured Content = SLive, FLive, MLBN*

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Live Featured Content in the Games Carousel
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Live, <content_title>, <content_description>, Press select to play. Move <appropriate_directions> to navigate to a new item. Move up or down to browse new content."
